/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libscorbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libscorbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/scorbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/scorbot_msgs/msg/joint_trajectory__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scorbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/scorbot_msgs/msg/joint_velocities__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scorbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/scorbot_msgs/msg/trajectory_point__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/leon/robotica/scorbotLabo/software_scorbot/scorbot_ws/build/scorbot_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libscorbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
